title: Wajeepeptin, a Cytotoxic and Antitrypanosomal Cyclic Depsipeptide from a Marine Moorena sp. Cyanobacterium.
author_string: Kurisawa, Naoaki, Jeelani, Ghulam, Nozaki, Tomoyoshi, Agusta, Adnan Luthfi, Suenaga, Kiyotake et al.
abstract: Here, we report wajeepeptin (1), a new cyclic depsipeptide isolated from a marine Moorena sp. cyanobacterium. The structure was elucidated by a combination of spectroscopic analyses, X-ray diffraction analysis, and degradation reactions. Wajeepeptin (1) showed moderate cytotoxicity (IC50 = 3.7 μM against HeLa cells) and potent antitrypanosomal activity (IC50 = 0.73 ± 0.14 μM against Trypanosoma brucei rhodesiense).
